title: Possible to set creator of update using graph API?

posts.author: christelferias (Chris Telfer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there.

I need to be able to create updates as specific users, so that these can then be edited by that user. Is it possible with the graph API, I can’t see from the docs anywhere to set the creator?

Appreciate it, thanks.

Chris

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @christelferias,
Welcome to the community

Currently, it is not possible to set the creator of an update. It is set automatically by monday.com. The most you can do is to query the creator of an update
